title: Tablet of Truth
description:
You defeat a pair of [blue]Guardian Kin[/blue] and make your way into a protected vault.

Inside is a [purple][sine]tablet with familiar inscriptions[/sine][/purple]. Your intuition tells you that this language can be deciphered rather easily... However, once you begin deciphering you'll be locked in.

The tablet gives off a soothing energy and you can smash it to receive its [green]healing energies[/green] instead.

options.title: Decipher
options.description: Lose [red]3[/red] Max HP. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card.

options.title: Give Up
options.description: Stop reading the text and leave.

notes:
This is a multi-step event. Choosing [gold]Decipher[/gold] locks you into a chain of up to 5 readings, each costing more Max HP. After each step (except the last), you may [gold]Give Up[/gold] and leave.

[gold]Decipher chain costs and rewards:[/gold]
- Step 1: Lose [red]3[/red] Max HP — upgrade a random card
- Step 2: Lose [red]6[/red] Max HP — upgrade a random card
- Step 3: Lose [red]12[/red] Max HP — upgrade a random card
- Step 4: Lose [red]24[/red] Max HP — upgrade a random card
- Step 5 ("Lose Everything"): Lose [red]MaxHp − 1[/red] Max HP — upgrade [gold]ALL[/gold] upgradable cards

Each decipher step is unavailable if your Max HP does not exceed the step's cost. The final step always leaves you at exactly [red]1[/red] Max HP. Only upgradable cards in your deck are affected. [gold]Give Up[/gold] is not available on the initial page — you must choose between Decipher and Smash.
